server.name: cloud.dchub/mcp-server
server.description: Data center intelligence platform — 15 MCP tools for facility search (50,000+ globally), M&A deal tracking ($51B+), construction pipeline (29.6 GW), site suitability scoring, real-time grid data, infrastructure mapping (substations, transmission, gas pipelines, fiber), energy pricing, and renewable energy data. Free tier: 10 calls/day. Developer: $49/mo.
